CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-20-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to CRC 3.1385. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
